name: Corruptus
description: Wielders of forbidden power, Corruptus masters blend hellfire with void corruption to devastate their enemies. They sacrifice their own essence for overwhelming destruction, trading safety for raw power.
lore: When the first flame met the endless void, the Corruptus were born. They are the children of chaos, marked by the burning darkness that flows through their veins. Feared and reviled, they walk the line between annihilation and apotheosis.

passive_ability.name: Soul Harvest
passive_ability.description: Hostile mobs slain by Corruptus grant Souls. Souls are spent like mana to fuel Corruptus abilities, so every kill feeds your next cast.

recommended_for: Players who enjoy overwhelming offense, managing risk vs reward, and watching enemies melt.
